about.bio:
I trained along two parallel paths: while completing my master's degree in Art History with a thesis in Cultural Heritage Legislation, I developed skills in various artistic techniques as a self-taught artist and through private courses.

Since 2018 I have been sketching on the go — quick drawings, first in pencil and then in watercolour, inspired by the places I visit and the people I meet.

The months I spent in London were fundamental to my personal growth; they laid the foundations for the Shubi project, which took shape a few years later, in Rome.

By sharing my sketches on social media, I established myself as a live artist for events, trips and ceremonies, bringing my unique performances first to various venues in Rome and then to events across Italy.

Beyond live painting, I create illustrations for different occasions: my work draws inspiration from people and the details of their everyday lives. I love telling their stories, with the aim of making painting an experience that everyone can live.

Today, I have chosen a slower pace that allows me to enjoy the creative process — seeing the projects I follow through to completion and dedicating careful attention to the people who have chosen me to give shape to their ideas.
about.cp_left1: My work is **slow, about listening and patience.** Behind the frenzy of events and lively preparations lies a **silent process** that, most of the time, unfolds in **complete solitude.**
about.cp_left2: From the moment an idea is born, it takes its place in a drawer of the mind, which works on it daily, trying to develop it.
about.cp_left3: **What defines the value of every single creation is the time dedicated to it before it exists, and the care it takes to make it what it is.**
about.cp_right1: In my studio, alternating music and films with moments of absolute silence, I try to grasp what might work and attempt to shape it through experimentation.
about.cp_right2: The season of events follows the months spent drawing them, in a cycle that seems to **follow nature:** a dormancy where ideas are born, then the moment they become ready for others.
about.cp_right3: I love my process and the thought of **always being able to create something new.** I don't want to be just one thing, and through my work I've learned that, when I feel the need, I can change.
about.cta_btn: Let's get to know each other
about.quote:
"The starry sky above me,
the moral law within me"

contacts.faq_a1: You can fill in the form above in detail. Use the last section to tell me *a few more details* — help me get to know you better :) If you'd like to add your Instagram profile, it would be lovely to put a face to your name!
contacts.faq_a2: A stationery suite consists of a set of illustrations created especially for you, which will decorate all the elements you choose for your event or wedding. The uniqueness of what we offer lies in the fact that the illustrations are not part of a catalogue — they are created *based on each individual request.*
contacts.faq_a3: For live painting I favour *watercolour*, and many of the catalogue pieces or stationery suites are also made with the same technique. I also use *oil paint, gouache and acrylic*, especially for the one-of-a-kind pieces you can find in my Shop.
contacts.faq_a4:
In the catalogue you will find a selection of watercolours available for reproduction: this means they can be ordered individually or in large quantities, depending on your needs — each piece will be unique because the watercolour is made by hand. *Use the order notes to include all relevant details*, such as the delivery date and packaging.
I personally oversee every order, so if needed I will get back in touch to discuss it :)
contacts.faq_a5:
My favourite service is the one that involves creating travel-style sketches: they can be personalised by the couple or the event organiser, and up to three different sketches can be made, allowing guests to choose the one they like best as a special keepsake.
With the *Combined Service*, the sketches as wedding favours can be paired with the portrait entertainment, engaging guests in the live painting while also providing unique favours they can later frame in their homes.
contacts.faq_a6: Yes — you can choose to have only the digital version and handle printing and packaging yourself, or *entrust that aspect to us* and receive all the finished, printed and packaged elements.
contacts.faq_a7: I work with *weddings, private events, institutional and corporate events*. I put the same commitment into all of them equally, even though they differ from one another and the way they unfold varies. For example, a wedding requires a greater time commitment and may last longer than a birthday party.
contacts.faq_a8:
I am based in *Prata Sannita* (CE).
I try to reach anywhere in Italy — I work in Sicily as well as Lombardy — but it depends on the feasibility of travel and the events calendar. We will discuss this together, evaluating the best way to reach you and calculating an estimated cost to cover any travel expenses.
contacts.faq_a9: As much as I would love to accept all commission requests, I sometimes have to decline — either because they are too far from my illustration style or because they are *not compatible with the work/events calendar* I have planned.
contacts.faq_q1: How can I get a personalised quote for my wedding?
contacts.faq_q2: What does creating a custom stationery suite involve?
contacts.faq_q3: What techniques do you work with?
contacts.faq_q4: How does the online Shop work for ordering multiple pieces for an event?
contacts.faq_q5: Which live painting service do you recommend for a wedding?
contacts.faq_q6: Is the custom stationery available in both digital and print form?
contacts.faq_q7: What types of events do you work with?
contacts.faq_q8: How far can you travel and how do you manage travel arrangements?
contacts.not_found: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?
contacts.not_found_sub: Send an email to our support address
contacts.orders_a1:
Orders are taken on and processed as quickly as possible, so *the time available to request changes is limited.*
If you need to make a change to your order, please contact us as soon as possible via [this form](support), stating the changes you require.
contacts.orders_a2:
Many products are handcrafted to order. If an item is temporarily unavailable, you will need to wait until it is made available for purchase in the Shop again.
For limited-edition or numbered products, restocking may not be planned, as these are one-of-a-kind pieces or available in very limited quantities.
contacts.orders_a3:
Immediately after completing your order, a confirmation email is sent to the address provided at the time of purchase.
If you cannot find it in your inbox, we recommend checking your spam or junk mail folder as well. If the email is not there, you can contact us via [this form](support) and we will verify as soon as possible.
contacts.orders_a4: If you received items different from those ordered, please contact us via [this form](support), stating the products received by mistake and those missing. We will investigate the situation and help you resolve the issue as quickly as possible.
contacts.orders_a5:
Every order is carefully checked before shipping. However, damage or issues may occur during transport.
If you received a defective or damaged product, please contact us via [this form](support) describing the problem and, if possible, *attaching some photographs.*
We will evaluate the most suitable solution together, which may include replacing the product or, where applicable, initiating the return procedure.
contacts.orders_a6:
A refund can be requested after the return request has been approved and the condition of the returned product has been verified.
Once authorised, the amount will be credited back to the same payment method used for the purchase. Credit times may vary depending on the banking circuit and may take a few working days.
contacts.orders_a7:
Several payment methods are accepted to make purchasing simple and secure.
You can pay with the main credit and debit cards, including Visa and Mastercard, or via PayPal, Google Pay and Apple Pay.
contacts.orders_a8:
If you have received a discount code or gift voucher, enter it on the *order checkout* page.
Once entered, the total amount of your order will be recalculated.
contacts.orders_q1: Can I modify my order once it has been placed?
contacts.orders_q2: How often are out-of-stock products restocked?
contacts.orders_q3: I have not received any order confirmation email.
contacts.orders_q6: How can I request a refund?
contacts.orders_q8: How can I use a discount code?
contacts.ship_a1: For watercolours and handmade products, production times can vary depending on the complexity of the order, ranging from a minimum of 7 days to a maximum of 20 working days.
contacts.ship_a2:
Shipments are made via Poste Italiane.
In *Italy*, the shipping cost is *€8.00* and delivery times are approximately 5–6 working days.
For *international* shipments, the cost is *€30.00.*
For all orders over *€79.00, shipping within Italy is free.*
contacts.ship_a3: Yes, you will receive an email with the tracking number to follow your shipment as soon as the order has been handed over to the courier.
contacts.ship_a4: Yes, I ship to several countries abroad. During the purchase process you can select your desired destination and automatically view the applicable shipping costs.
contacts.ship_a5:
Shipments within Italy are not subject to customs duties or taxes.
For orders destined abroad, any duties, taxes or customs clearance costs may be applied by the authorities of the destination country and are the responsibility of the customer.
For more information, please consult our Purchase and Shipping Policy.
contacts.ship_a6: If your order has not arrived or appears to be lost, you can write to us via [support form](support) and we will do our best to help you :)
contacts.ship_a7:
You can submit your return request via [support form](support).
It will be reviewed and, only if approved, the return or exchange procedure will be initiated.
You can request a return within 14 days of the order, but for more information please consult our Purchase and Shipping Policy.
contacts.ship_a8:
*Returns or refunds cannot be requested for personalised products.*
For more information, please consult our Purchase and Shipping Policy.
contacts.ship_q1: How long does it take to ship an order?
contacts.ship_q5: Do I have to pay customs duties or taxes?
contacts.ship_q6: What should I do if my order has been lost?
contacts.ship_q7: How can I submit a return request?
contacts.ship_q8: Are there cases where returns or changes are not possible?
contacts.shop_a1:
To preserve your products as best as possible, you can follow the care instructions included with your order.
In general, we recommend avoiding *prolonged exposure of the artworks to direct sunlight*, to keep the colours and quality intact over time.
contacts.shop_a2: Yes, for special requests you can write everything in the order notes.
contacts.shop_a3: All artworks are drawn and *handmade in Italy.*
contacts.shop_a4:
Yes, for some products it is possible to select the desired quantity. In this case, the product can be *crafted by hand in multiple copies*, maintaining the characteristics and care typical of handmade work.
If the option to select a quantity is not available, it means the product is a one-of-a-kind piece or is available in very limited quantities.
contacts.shop_q1: How can I take care of my watercolours?
contacts.shop_q3: Where are the artworks drawn and made?
contacts.shop_q4: Can I order multiple pieces from the Shop for an event?

cookiePolicy.pref_manage_desc: You can change your cookie preferences at any time.
cookiePolicy.intro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. On this page we explain what data we collect, how we use it and what your rights are.
cookiePolicy.s10_body: This site is not intended for users under 16 years of age and we do not knowingly collect personal data relating to minors.
cookiePolicy.s11_outro_pre: To exercise your rights, send us an email at
cookiePolicy.s12_body: We may periodically update this Privacy Policy. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated effective date.
cookiePolicy.s13_post: , we will be happy to help!
cookiePolicy.s13_pre: If you have questions or concerns about your privacy, contact us at
cookiePolicy.s1_body_pre: The data controller is Clarissa Cucciniello. For any questions, you can contact us at
cookiePolicy.s2_b4: Data provided through communications (e.g. support requests)
cookiePolicy.s2_b5: Usage data (IP address, device, browser, interaction with the site)
cookiePolicy.s2_intro: We collect various types of personal data depending on how you use the site:
cookiePolicy.s3_b1: Directly from you (e.g. when placing an order or creating an account)
cookiePolicy.s3_b2: Automatically via cookies and similar technologies
cookiePolicy.s4_b4: Improve the site and our services
cookiePolicy.s4_outro: With your consent, we may send you promotional communications, from which you can unsubscribe at any time.
cookiePolicy.s5_b1: Performance of a contract (e.g. purchase of products)
cookiePolicy.s5_b3: Legitimate interest (e.g. security and service improvement)
cookiePolicy.s5_intro: We process your data on the basis of:
cookiePolicy.s6_body:
Our site uses cookies and similar technologies to ensure correct operation, improve the browsing experience and analyse traffic.

You can adjust your browser settings to refuse cookies if you prefer.
cookiePolicy.s7_body:
Your data may be shared with service providers necessary for the site's operation, such as payment, hosting, order management, shipping and email communication services.

These parties process data in accordance with their own privacy policies and in compliance with applicable regulations.
cookiePolicy.s8_body:
Some services used may involve the transfer of data outside the European Union.

In such cases, providers adopt adequate measures to ensure a level of protection consistent with applicable regulations.
cookiePolicy.s9_body:
We adopt appropriate measures to protect your personal data.

We retain data only for the time necessary to provide the requested services and fulfil legal obligations, such as tax and accounting requirements.

gallery.title: Gallery

reviews.title: Talent, heart and professionalism
reviews.text: Clarissa provided live painting throughout our entire wedding reception. From our very first interactions she was kind and available; once we met her, she proved to be so much more. She entertained our guests with tireless professionalism, sweetness and warmth. She created wonderful portraits that everyone loved. Our guests took home a unique and special memory of our day. Clarissa has a rare talent and we were so happy and honoured that she filled the most important day of our lives with beauty.

reviews.title: Live painting at an autumn wedding 🎨
reviews.text: Clarissa is an incredibly sweet person as well as an exceptional professional. Our guests absolutely loved her portraits, and her presence and talent were wonderful entertainment at our wedding. We would choose her again without any doubt!!

reviews.title: Fabi and Ross, October 11, 2025
reviews.text:
We were so happy and extremely satisfied with the unique and precious work Clarissa did during our wedding. Her portraits enchanted all the guests, not to mention the wonderful wedding favours she created beforehand, which far exceeded our expectations. Skill, professionalism, care, kindness and sweetness are all qualities you will find in Clarissa and in her work from beginning to end!

Highly recommended 🤍

reviews.title: A memory made with love
reviews.text:
We entrusted Clarissa with the creation of our wedding favours. Everything was perfect! Her availability, kindness, discretion and talent truly impressed us. We could not have made a better choice. Our guests were amazed and delighted to take home a unique memory of such a special day.

All that remains is to say thank you, from the bottom of our hearts! 💘

reviews.title: Love at first sight
reviews.text: Clarissa is a talented artist and a wonderful person. Discovering her on social media and then meeting her in person only confirmed what we had already sensed: the sweetness, professionalism and dedication she brought to our wedding project were impeccable. We chose the live painting service, creating travel sketches inspired by different views of the magical venue that hosted our wedding. The postcard then completed the wedding favours for our guests and was an extra touch that made our wedding unique and personal. Thank you, Clari, for sharing this journey with us. Until next time!

reviews.title: A handmade wedding favour made with love: romantic and chic!
reviews.text:
We had the pleasure of having Clarissa and her assistant at our wedding for a truly unique experience: a live painting performance that left all our guests speechless. With great talent and sensitivity, she created beautiful watercolour wedding favours, each handmade and personalised, turning a special memory into a small work of art. Her presence was discreet yet engaging: many guests stood enchanted watching her paint. Beyond the artistic quality, we appreciated the professionalism, punctuality and care with which she handled every detail. We wholeheartedly recommend her art to anyone who wants to make an event truly unforgettable.

Thank you from the bottom of our hearts! 🩷🥹🌿

reviews.title: Sweetness and professionalism
reviews.text:
We chose Clarissa as the portrait artist for our wedding and she was fantastic! 💕 So sweet, highly professional and incredibly talented.

The portraits as wedding favours were a huge success, our guests complimented us and loved the idea 💕

We would choose her again without thinking twice!

Thank you from the heart for making our day even more special ❤️

reviews.title: The frame of our dream 💖
reviews.text:
We contacted Clarissa a year and a half before our wedding day with a specific request: portraits during our wedding. Clarissa not only accepted our request, but also showed us the unmistakable style of her portraits, which took our breath away. We then started working on the postcard design and preparing for the big day. Clarissa spent the entire event capturing our guests and painting them in watercolour on cardstock. Watching her paint was incredible, but even more moving was seeing the dedication and love she puts into her work. It felt as if we had known her forever. Our guests loved the portraits, and the next day they all sent us photos of them displayed in their homes. Would we recommend her? Absolutely!

She is that touch of art and wonder that frames a beautiful day. 💖

reviews.title: A special surprise for the guests!
reviews.text: Clarissa was uniquely sweet and professional. All the guests were struck by the idea of receiving such original and personal wedding favours. We highly recommend her to everyone!!

reviews.title: An amazing service
reviews.text:
We chose Clarissa to create our wedding favours, and we could not have made a better decision. She managed to portray 150 guests during our wedding, leaving everyone, young and old, amazed!

After considering other portrait artists, we chose Shubi Hubi for its unique and unmistakable style.

Thank you from the bottom of our hearts, Clarissa and Giuseppe, for your warmth, professionalism, kindness and for being such a special presence on our big day.

reviews.title: Art is uniqueness, just like every love story.
reviews.text:
The wedding favours from our wedding were not simple keepsakes, but true works of art: created live, before the amazed eyes of our guests, by an extraordinary artist, Clarissa.

Together we chose a mixed service:
- paintings for each guest featuring the venue and us as the couple
- portraits of our guests
- themed table markers and ceremony booklets

The common thread in all of this was that every piece was painted by hand, both in the studio and during the day itself, inspired by what mattered most to us: the church, the villa and our loved ones. Each one became an irreplaceable fragment of our story.

Watching Clarissa at work was the perfect blend of creativity, emotion and beauty. Our guests were speechless; many told us they had never received a wedding favour so special and personal. We did not just give something authentic, we created an experience, a gesture of gratitude transformed into living art.

Heartfelt thanks to the artist! We will carry these little wonders in our hearts and in our homes forever!

reviews.title: Live Painting / Wedding Favours
reviews.text:
We discovered Clarissa through an Instagram post… and it was such a wonderful surprise!

From the very first contact she stood out for her sweetness, availability, clarity, honesty and PASSION for her art.

She puts her soul and her whole self into what she does, and I can assure you the results show it.

We understood each other immediately. I kept her updated on my "crazy" ideas and on the style we were choosing for our wedding.

NOTHING WAS EVER A PROBLEM. She is always ready to advise, reassure and find a way to help. We chose the Live Painting / Wedding Favours service and it was a winning decision. All our guests were fascinated by her talent and by the originality of her artistic expression.

If you are looking for something UNIQUE, like her, choose her… YOU WILL NOT REGRET IT!

With love, Ilaria & Luca

Weddings at Casal Montani

reviews.title: Perfect experience!
reviews.text: We asked her to create the illustration for our invitations and then chose the live painting service with portraits of our guests, and we were extremely satisfied! Clarissa is adorable, creative, professional and empathetic. It was such a blessing to meet her and everyone appreciated her service. Something special, unique, personalised and fun.

reviews.title: Enchanting
reviews.text:
I found Clarissa on Instagram and immediately fell in love with her work... we met and I instantly understood she was the right person for me: available, genuine and creative.

She is truly passionate about her work.

On the wedding day she was magnificent and discreet. She managed the workflow and the arrangement of the wedding favours impeccably, even portraying my 60 friends and a few more within the time slots we had agreed on together!

Highly, highly recommended, not only for the portraits but also for the organisation of the stationery and her whole setup!

Fantastic!

reviews.title: The best wedding favour! 😍
reviews.text:
We loved the idea of giving a portrait as a wedding favour from the very start, and once we found Clarissa we had no doubts at all.

She was super available and organised, the portraits are beautiful and our guests really appreciated the idea. Thank you!!

reviews.title: Wonderful live entertainment for guests
reviews.text:
Clarissa is a sweet and creative professional: the live portrait service for our guests was hugely appreciated. Recommended! :)

Heartfelt thanks, Clarissa.

reviews.title: Guests loved her portraits created as wedding favours!
reviews.text: Clarissa brings not only great passion to her work but also outstanding professionalism. In our case, she did not just provide a live painting service, she also created 100 spectacular wedding favours that guests loved for both their style and originality ❤️

reviews.title: Very original
reviews.text:
I organise weddings, so every wedding favour felt ordinary to me... Clarissa offers an original, high-quality service, and personalising an object makes the memory last over time!

Thank you ☺️

reviews.title: Live painting: portraits for guests
reviews.text:
The live painting service (cards with portraits of the guests, drawn live and contextualised) was very appreciated by our guests and gave our wedding an extra touch of elegance and originality!

Clarissa proved to be available, reliable and professional in everything we had agreed on, and very attentive to our guests.

She took great care with the setup of the station, the cards and the display for delivery.

Thank you, Clarissa, for the original and special experience you gave our guests!

P.S. many of them displayed the portraits in their homes :)

reviews.title: An original and artistic memory for our guests
reviews.text:
The live painting at our wedding was simply something unique, and our guests deeply appreciated the originality and, above all, the chance to take home a small memory of this special place. Clarissa is not only a very talented artist but also a wonderful person. Her sensitivity and availability made working with her incredibly enjoyable. She also fulfilled our request to create original portraits as gifts for our witnesses, who were literally speechless. Clarissa, through your drawings you gave us unique emotions.

With love, Valentina and Nicola

reviews.title: Simply sensational!
reviews.text:
I kept thinking about how to make my wedding unique by giving guests a place card they could also take home with them. I commissioned personalised tambourines and the result was spectacular.

Everything was studied down to the smallest detail. From choosing the lettering style, letter by letter, uppercase and lowercase, to applying it on the tambourine in a way that would not smudge or fade. Beyond the purely technical aspects, which were solved brilliantly with a sensational result, Shubi Hubi Studio supported me throughout the entire process and kept me involved step by step in the work as it progressed. I could not have asked for more! All the guests were speechless! Thank you!

quotes.quote: "Clari is a wonderful artist and soul. Working with her, while also being her client, is always a pleasure. She creates little memories that stay carved in your heart."
quotes.author: Benedetta, Content Creator

quotes.quote: "I had the pleasure of having Clarissa at one of my events and we all immediately fell in love with her! Professional and sweet."
quotes.author: Rossella, stylist

quotes.quote: "Clarissa is a lovely girl and everything she creates is both simple and profound at the same time. As an organiser of art and craft themed events, I will always want her with me."
quotes.author: Melissa, SMM

quotes.quote: "Clarissa is incredibly kind and available! She is truly talented in her drawings, very eclectic, and responds easily to every request."
quotes.author: Eleonora, Stylist

gallery.giorgia_body: For their wedding favours, the couple took inspiration from the garden where their reception was held, and the huge willow tree was featured in the 120 travel sketches gifted to guests as favours. During the aperitif and after dinner, with the open bar, I entertained the guests with live watercolour portraits. I also created the illustrations for their seating tableau, inspired by the five continents, and the ceremony booklet, whose cover illustration was inspired by the altar of the Church of Chandeliers in Rome.
gallery.leonardo_body: For Leonardo's baptism, his mother Giorgia asked me to create a rocking horse in shades of blue. From that illustration I then designed the digital invitation and the logo, which allowed her to personalise the entire event, from napkins to cake-table decorations to confetti bags. Every detail was carefully curated around their rocking horse.
gallery.pietropaolo_body: For this couple's wedding we recreated a magical atmosphere by creating their wedding favours during the aperitif. Three images of the venue, including this splendid stained-glass window in the hall where the ceremony took place, became three delicate watercolours, packaged together with frames to become the wedding favour.
gallery.martina_body: To give their guests something truly unique, the couple chose to have me personalise tambourines for each of them, so that each place card could become a memory of their wedding. At the end of the ceremony, the wedding favour was delivered in a personalised tote bag featuring an image inspired by the wedding venue. The bag was designed to hold not only the favour, but also the tambourine itself to take home.
gallery.marzamemi_body: The Mixed Service allows us to work on the wedding favours in the studio, so that on the day of the ceremony we can devote ourselves to entertaining guests with live portraiture, and that is exactly what we did for this couple, who chose to marry in a small fishing village in Sicily. Three views of enchanting Marzamemi became the wedding favours, and guests could choose which of the three watercolours to take home as a memory of that special day.
gallery.clarissa_p1: I work in the visual arts and personally oversee every creative project at Shubi Hubi Studio, from custom illustrations to the unique pieces in my shop.
gallery.clarissa_p2: Find out more about my journey and training, read about my creative process, and explore my travel sketches.
gallery.radisson_body: "Oh my terrazza!" is the format created by the IED team, who chose the stunning 360° panoramic terrace over Rome at the Radisson Collection Hotel for their event. It was an evening of cinema and Roman landscapes, dedicated to the city's terraces. During the event, I painted the panorama we were all looking at from the hotel terrace: a Roman sunset featuring the Altare della Patria.
gallery.martina_title:
**Place cards** handwritten
and **bags** for the wedding
favours of
Martina and Carmine
gallery.marzamemi_title:
Painting the views
of **Marzamemi**
for Fabiola and Rosario
gallery.radisson_title:
Themed live painting
for IED at the **Radisson**
Collection Hotel
of Ancient Rome

home.gallery_cta_sub: THE STORIES I'VE TOUCHED WITH MY OWN HANDS
home.lp_body: The perfect entertainment to make your event even more unique. Let me paint live for your guests and give them a one-of-a-kind handmade memory.
home.no_products: No products found for the selected IDs.
home.stat_body: The perfect frame for your event, designed to represent you! Choose all the elements for original and effective communication.
home.welcome:
Welcome to my Studio.
I'm Clarissa: I paint live and illustrate, using analogue techniques, stories and people.
I love my work because when I have an image in mind,
home.welcome_bold: I can make you see it too.

livePainting.about_body1: Through the creation of travel-style watercolour sketches around the world, I began to make a name for myself as a live artist: the sketches created during live painting sessions are quick, inspired by special moments, and transformed into unique memories. Everyone can witness the birth of a small work of art, personalised and created on the spot.
livePainting.about_body2: My style for live painting is characterised by stylised images and vivid colours; through the use of watercolour and mixed techniques, the images take shape, are displayed and then given to guests as a memory of the event.
livePainting.bomboniere_contact_desc: For special requests, write to us here to receive all the information
livePainting.bomboniere_shop_desc: Discover our solutions already available in the Shop, ready to be ordered
livePainting.bomboniere_subtitle:
Live painting not available for your event?
You can order your Bomboniere made remotely.
livePainting.card1_desc: Once the reference is defined, I will create drafts so you can choose the sketch you like best, which will then be reproduced on each postcard by hand.
livePainting.card2_desc: During the ceremony I create quick portraits of anyone who wants to pose for a few minutes, capturing the details with watercolour washes and mixed media.
livePainting.card3_desc: Guests are photographed upon arrival according to the wedding favour arrangements, and are then portrayed from the photos during the ceremony while they enjoy the party.
livePainting.card4_desc: A complete service including the creation of travel sketch wedding favours in the studio, and live entertainment to involve guests during the ceremony.
livePainting.cta_text: Contact me to tell me about your idea and request your personalised quote
livePainting.hero_body_sm:
It is a form of entertainment that consists of painting
in front of people who observe and interact with
what the artist creates. A unique way to surprise
your guests — every project is carefully curated
and personalised for whoever commissions it.
livePainting.hero_left:
It is a form of entertainment that consists
of painting in front of people who observe
and interact with what the artist creates.
livePainting.hero_right:
A unique way to surprise your guests —
every project is carefully curated in every detail
and personalised for whoever commissions it.
livePainting.pricing_body: The quote for a live painting service includes not only the pieces created during the entertainment but also the performance of painting live and the skill required to do so for the duration requested. Here are some of our proposals.
livePainting.pricing_title: The service that's right for you
livePainting.why_1: Offer original entertainment, with the chance to interact with an artist at work and watch a watercolour come to life;
livePainting.why_2: Give your guests unique, handmade creations;
livePainting.why_3: Customise every detail of the entertainment to your liking — choose which references will become watercolours for your special event.
livePainting.review_01_text:
I was thinking about how to make my wedding unique by giving guests a place card they could also take home with them. I commissioned personalised tambourines and the result was spectacular.

Everything was studied down to the smallest detail. From choosing the lettering style, letter by letter, uppercase and lowercase, to applying it on the tambourine in a way that would not smudge or fade. Beyond the purely technical aspects, all solved brilliantly with a sensational result, Shubi Hubi Studio supported me throughout the whole process and kept me involved step by step in the work as it developed! I could not have asked for anything better! All the guests were speechless! Thank you!
livePainting.review_02_title: An original and artistic keepsake for our guests
livePainting.review_02_text:
The live painting at our wedding was simply something unique, and our guests truly appreciated the originality and, above all, the chance to take home a small keepsake from this special place. Clarissa is not only a very talented artist but also a wonderful person; her sensitivity and helpfulness made working with her an absolute pleasure. She also managed to fulfil our request to create original portraits as gifts for our witnesses, who were literally left speechless. Clarissa, through your drawings you gave us unique emotions.

With love, Valentina and Nicola
livePainting.review_03_text:
The live painting service (cards with guest portraits, drawn live and contextualised) was greatly appreciated by our guests and added an extra touch of class and originality to our wedding!

Clarissa was helpful, reliable and professional with regard to the agreements made, and very attentive towards the guests.

The station setup, the cards and the arrangement for handing them out were all carefully managed.

I thank Clarissa for the original and special experience she gave our guests!

P.S. many of them displayed the portraits in their homes :)
livePainting.review_04_text:
I organise weddings, so any wedding favour seemed ordinary to me… Clarissa offers an original, high-quality service, and personalising an object makes the memory last over time!

Thank you ☺️
livePainting.review_05_title: Guests loved the portraits she created as wedding favours!
livePainting.review_05_text: Clarissa puts not only great passion into her work but also great professionalism. In our case, she not only performed a live painting service but also created 100 spectacular wedding favours that guests appreciated for both their style and originality ❤️
livePainting.review_06_text:
Clarissa is a sweet and creative professional: the live portrait service for our guests was hugely appreciated. Highly recommended! :)

Thank you from the bottom of our hearts, Clarissa
livePainting.review_07_text:
We loved the idea of having a portrait made as a wedding favour from the very start, and once we found Clarissa we had no more doubts.

Super helpful and organised, the portraits are stunning and the idea was greatly appreciated by our guests. Thank you!!
livePainting.review_08_text:
I found Clarissa on Instagram and immediately fell in love with her work... we met, and I instantly understood she was right for me: helpful, genuine and creative.

She is passionate about her work..

On the wedding day she was magnificent and discreet. She managed the work and the arrangement of the wedding favours impeccably, succeeding in portraying my 60 friends and even a few more within the time slots we had already planned together!

Super, super recommended, not only for the portraits but also for the organisation of the invitations and her whole setup!

Fantastic!
livePainting.review_09_text: We had the illustration for our invitations made, and then we chose the live painting service with portraits of our guests, and we were extremely satisfied! Clarissa is an adorable, creative, professional and empathetic person! We were lucky to meet her and everyone appreciated her service! Something distinctive, unique, personalised and fun.
livePainting.review_10_text:
We contacted Clarissa through an Instagram post… and it was such a lovely surprise!

From the very first contact, she stood out for her sweetness, helpfulness, clarity, honesty and PASSION for her art.

She puts her soul, her whole self into it, and I assure you the results show.

We understood each other and connected right away. I kept her updated on my "crazy" ideas and the style we were choosing for our wedding.

NOTHING WAS EVER A PROBLEM; she is always ready to advise, reassure and find a way to help. We chose the Live Painting / Wedding Favours service and it was a winning choice. All our guests were fascinated by her talent and by the novelty of her artistic expression.

If you are looking for something UNIQUE, like her, choose her… YOU WILL NOT REGRET IT!

With love, Ilaria & Luca

Matrimoni a Casal Montani
livePainting.review_11_title: Art is uniqueness, just as every love is unique.
livePainting.review_11_text:
The wedding favours at our wedding were not simple "keepsakes", but true works of art: created live, before the amazed eyes of our guests, by an extraordinary artist, Clarissa.

We chose a combined service with her:
- paintings for each guest depicting the venue and us as newlyweds
- portraits of our guests
- themed table markers and booklets

The common thread through all of this: every piece was painted by hand in the studio and during the day, inspired by what mattered to us as a couple, namely the church, the villa and our loved ones. Each one became an unrepeatable fragment of our story.

Watching Clarissa at work was a perfect blend of creativity, emotion and beauty. Our guests were speechless; many told us they had never received such a special and personal wedding favour. Not only did we give something authentic, but we also created an experience, a gesture of gratitude transformed into living art.

A heartfelt thank you to the artist! We will carry these little wonders in our hearts and in our homes forever!
livePainting.review_12_text:
We decided to rely on Clarissa to create our wedding favours, and we could not have made a better choice. She managed to portray as many as 150 guests during our wedding, leaving everyone, adults and children alike, astonished!

After considering other portrait artists, we chose Shubi Hubi for its unique and unmistakable style.

Heartfelt thanks, Clarissa and Giuseppe, for your friendliness, professionalism, kindness and for being such a special presence on our big day.
livePainting.review_13_title: A special surprise for the guests!
livePainting.review_13_text: Clarissa was uniquely sweet and professional. All the guests were impressed by the idea of having such original and personal wedding favours. We highly, highly recommend her to everyone!!
livePainting.review_14_text:
We contacted Clarissa a year and a half before our wedding day, with a specific request: to create portraits on the day of our wedding. Clarissa not only accepted our request, but also showed us the unmistakable style of her portraits, which took our breath away. So we began working on the frame for the postcard and prepared for the big day. What can I say? Clarissa spent the entire event capturing our guests and painting them in watercolour on card. It was a spectacle to watch her paint, but above all to see the dedication and love she puts into it. It felt like we had known her forever. Our guests loved the portraits, and the next day they all sent us photos of them displayed in their homes. Do we recommend her? Of course we do!

It is that touch of art and wonder that frames a beautiful day. 💖
livePainting.review_15_text:
We chose Clarissa as the portrait artist for our wedding and she was fantastic! 💕 So sweet, super professional and incredibly talented at her work.

The portraits as wedding favours were a huge success, guests complimented us and loved the idea 💕

We would choose her again without thinking twice!

Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for making our day even more special ❤️
livePainting.review_16_title: A handmade wedding favour made with love: romantic and chic!
livePainting.review_16_text:
We had the pleasure of having Clarissa and her assistant at our wedding for a truly unique experience: live painting that left all the guests open-mouthed. With great talent and sensitivity, she created beautiful watercolour wedding favours, each handmade and personalised, turning a special memory into a little work of art. Her presence was discreet yet engaging at the same time: many guests stopped, enchanted, to watch her paint. Beyond the artistic quality, we appreciated the professionalism, punctuality and willingness with which she handled every detail. We wholeheartedly recommend her art to anyone wishing to make an event truly unforgettable.

Thank you so much! 🩷🥹🌿
livePainting.review_17_text: Clarissa is a talented artist as well as a wonderful person. Finding her first on social media and then meeting her in person only confirmed what we had already understood: the sweetness, professionalism and dedication she devoted to our wedding project were impeccable. We used the live painting service by creating "travel sketches" with various views of the magical venue that hosted our wedding. The postcard then completed the wedding favours for our guests and was an extra special touch that made our wedding unique and personalised. Thank you, Clari, for sharing this adventure with us. Until next time!
livePainting.review_18_text:
We entrusted Clarissa with creating the wedding favours for our wedding. Everything was perfect! Her helpfulness, kindness, discretion and talent impressed us. We could not have made a better choice. The guests were amazed and delighted to have a unique keepsake from such a special day.

All that remains is to say thank you, a thank you from the bottom of our hearts! 💘
livePainting.review_19_text:
We are thrilled and extremely satisfied with the unique and precious work Clarissa carried out during the wedding. Her portraits enchanted all the guests, not to mention the wonderful wedding favours prepared beforehand, which far exceeded our expectations. Skill, professionalism, care, kindness and sweetness are Clarissa's qualities that you will find in her work from beginning to end!

Highly recommended 🤍
livePainting.review_20_title: Live painting at an autumn wedding 🎨
livePainting.review_20_text: Clarissa is an incredibly sweet person as well as an exceptional professional. Our guests greatly appreciated her portraits, and her presence and talent were wonderful entertainment at our wedding. We would choose her again without any doubt!!
livePainting.review_21_text: Clarissa provided the live painting service throughout our entire wedding reception. From the very first contact she appeared kind and helpful; once we got to know her, she proved to be much more than that. She entertained our guests with tireless professionalism, and with great sweetness and warmth. She created wonderful portraits that everyone appreciated. The guests took home a unique and special keepsake from our day. Clarissa has a rare talent and we were delighted and honoured that she brought beauty to the most important day of our lives.

shippingPolicy.intro_pre: For any questions or assistance regarding your order, you can contact us via the
shippingPolicy.s10_b2: Photos of the item and packaging
shippingPolicy.s10_intro_pre: If your item arrived damaged or defective, please fill out the
shippingPolicy.s10_outro: We will do everything we can to help.
shippingPolicy.s1_body:
Processing and packaging times depend on the number of items ordered and the availability of our work schedule. These may range from a minimum of 7 days to a maximum of 30 business days.
Processing time is separate from shipping time.
You will receive a confirmation email once your order is placed and another one when it ships.
shippingPolicy.s2_b2: Events outside our control (e.g. strikes, bad weather, customs delays)
shippingPolicy.s2_intro:
Please double-check all address details at checkout. The person placing the order is responsible for providing accurate shipping information and for paying any customs duties or import taxes.
We are not responsible for delivery issues arising from:
shippingPolicy.s3_body:
Once a package is marked as delivered to the address provided at the time of order, we are not responsible for any theft, loss, or deliveries made to unsecured locations.
We recommend verifying your address carefully and, if needed, arranging a safe delivery method directly with the courier.
shippingPolicy.s4_b1: Standard Shipping in Italy, 5–6 business days at a cost of €9.00
shippingPolicy.s4_b2: Shipping to Europe, 5–6 business days at a cost of €30.00
shippingPolicy.s4_intro: Shipments are made from Italy via Poste Italiane.
shippingPolicy.s4_outro:
For all orders over €79.00, Standard Shipping within Italy is free.
Delivery times are estimated and not guaranteed. Delays due to customs, the courier, or particularly busy periods may extend delivery.
shippingPolicy.s5_body:
Customs duties and import taxes are not included at checkout and are the responsibility of the recipient.
Any duties and taxes are determined by the customs authorities of the destination country. Rates vary by country and are outside our control.
If a package is refused due to non-payment of customs duties, it may not be returned and a refund may not be issued.
By placing an international order with us, you agree to these terms.
shippingPolicy.s6_body:
If your item is a pre-order, the estimated shipping date will be clearly stated in the product description.
By completing your purchase, you accept the expected waiting times.
shippingPolicy.s7_b1: The request must be made within 14 days of receiving the product
shippingPolicy.s7_b2: Items must be unused, in their original packaging and in resalable condition
shippingPolicy.s7_intro_post:
.
If something goes wrong with your order, we accept returns on eligible items under the following conditions:
shippingPolicy.s7_intro_pre: To request a return, you must provide proof of purchase and fill out the
shippingPolicy.s7_outro_a: Items marked as "final sale" or "non-refundable" cannot be refunded, but may be returned for store credit with no expiration date.
shippingPolicy.s7_outro_b:
Once we receive your return request, we will review it and notify you of the outcome by email. If approved, you will receive return instructions.
Return shipping is the customer's responsibility and is non-refundable, unless the item is defective or not as described. In that case, after receiving and inspecting the return, we will refund the shipping cost as store credit. To receive the shipping refund, proof of payment must be provided.
We recommend using a trackable shipping method, as we are not responsible for any loss during the return.
Once the package is received and the return is inspected, we will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund request. If approved:
shippingPolicy.s7_outro_bold: Personalised items (e.g. items with names, specific event dates, or made to order) are not eligible for refunds under any circumstances.
shippingPolicy.s7_rb1: Any product cost refund will be processed to the original payment method within a few days
shippingPolicy.s7_rb2: If applicable, the shipping cost refund will be issued as store credit on our website
shippingPolicy.s8_body_pre:
If you haven't received a refund yet, please first check your bank account. It may take some time before the refund is officially posted, so contact your bank. There is often some processing time before a refund is registered.
If you've followed these steps and still haven't received your refund, you can contact us via the
shippingPolicy.s9_b1: We cannot issue a refund or reship a package until the courier's investigation is complete
shippingPolicy.s9_b2: If the courier confirms delivery to the provided address, we cannot guarantee a refund or replacement
shippingPolicy.s9_intro_post: . We will open an investigation with the courier. Please note:
shippingPolicy.s9_intro_pre: If your order hasn't arrived within 10 days of the expected delivery window, you can contact us via the
shippingPolicy.s9_outro: In any case, we remain available to support you and explore possible solutions together.
shippingPolicy.title: Shipping & Purchase Policy

stationery.intro_left:
Stationery includes all the elements that
characterise an event. These details make
the communication with guests unique, and every
element is designed to serve a purpose.
stationery.intro_right:
The uniqueness of our Stationery comes from
original illustrations, created bespoke for each
couple or individual event — not selected
from a predefined catalogue.
stationery.intro_sm:
Stationery includes all the elements that
characterise an event. These details make
the communication with guests unique, and every
element is designed to serve a purpose.
The uniqueness of our Stationery comes from
original illustrations, created bespoke for each
couple or individual event — not selected
from a predefined catalogue.
stationery.price_body: You can request only the custom illustrations, the print-ready files — agreeing in advance on sizes and formats — or the individual elements complete with printing and packaging. The quote will be built around your ideas and requests, since the stationery suite is entirely customisable according to the client's specific needs. Here are some of our proposals.
stationery.price_card2_desc: E.g. monograms with initials or medium-complexity imagery
stationery.price_card3_desc: E.g. save the date or a single digital invitation
stationery.price_card4_desc: 2 complex, 2 simple, 3 decorative, plus graphic adaptation
stationery.price_card5_desc: To digitise the illustrations once completed and adapt them to the individual elements
stationery.price_card6_desc: Printing and packaging, giving shape to the idea with delivery of all the requested elements!
stationery.price_title: Choose the right elements for you
stationery.section_body1: During an initial consultation, information is gathered about the venue, the colours and the theme chosen for the event, and you will be able to choose which elements to create from those on offer.
stationery.section_body2: I will create a Moodboard with all the ideas for the project based on the information provided and my inspiration, along with a bespoke quote. I will then personally craft each requested element of the stationery in my artistic style, following the pre-agreed dates in the dedicated calendar.
stationery.why_1: We tell a story together through brilliant, vivid illustrations designed to **frame your event**;
stationery.why_2: Communicate with your guests in an original way, to **make them feel special**;
stationery.why_3: Customise every detail of your stationery and enjoy the **birth of a unique project**, built around you.

events.title: Events and activities
events.intro:
Hours of exchange, drawing and study. But also of light-heartedness and sharing.
An idea that takes shape through different activities, designed to make art accessible to everyone, turning it into an experience to be lived.
events.workshop_body1: Workshops are events where art becomes a form of pure entertainment, designed both for beginners and for those who need to stimulate their creativity.
events.workshop_body2: Each participant has a complete station, with all the materials needed to express themselves freely, following the theme of the workshop, in a relaxed and convivial atmosphere.
events.workshop_body3: A moment to have fun and relax together, following an inspiring theme.
events.workshop_body4: The experience is available by private booking and is perfect for birthday parties, corporate events and team building, private events and special occasions to be lived creatively. The goal is always to offer an inclusive, light and stimulating experience, where art becomes an opportunity for exchange and growth.
events.organize_title: Let us organise your art event
events.organize_body: To organise your bespoke event, you can email me with the date you are interested in — day, month and year — in the subject line, adding all the relevant details such as ideas, theme inspiration, expected number of guests and location.

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help with an order or a request? Write to us through the support form or send us an email: we will get back to you as soon as possible.
support.form_subtitle: Fill in the form and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

I can't wait to hear from you! :)

cookieBanner.title: Cookie preferences
cookieBanner.body: We use technically necessary cookies to ensure the correct functioning of the site. With your consent, we may also use optional analytics, profiling and marketing cookies.
cookieBanner.pref_manage_desc: You can change your cookie preferences at any time.
cookieBanner.pref_necessary_desc: Always active. Required for navigation, login, cart, checkout and security.
cookieBanner.pref_analytics_desc: Optional. Help us understand how the site is used to improve its performance.
cookieBanner.pref_marketing_desc: Optional. Used to personalise your experience and suggest relevant content.
